name: Promotion enrollment success
description: Documented success response (Promotion Enrollment body) for enrolling a contact in a promotion with an enrollment offer; returns the assigned promotionPartyUsageId. Mirrors the doc JSON example at lines 32239-32264.
notes: Request body type per the resource definition is Enrollment Input: a single required `inputParameters` array of Enrollment Details Input. Each Enrollment Details Input requires `promotion` (Promotion Identifier Input) and EITHER `account` (Account Identifier Input) OR `contact` (Contact Identifier Input), account required if contact isn't provided and vice versa; `enrollmentOffer`, `enrollmentEffectiveDateTime`, `enrollmentExpirationDateTime` are Optional. Response body type is Promotion Enrollment: a single `results` array of Enrollment Details. Each Enrollment Details echoes account/contact/promotion/enrollmentOffer + dates and adds `promotionPartyUsageId` (String). The resource definition example (lines 23794-23814) uses `contact`, while the Enrollment Details Input standalone example (lines 25009-25031) uses `account`, both are valid since one of account/contact is required. CAVEAT: the v67.0 guide does NOT document an error or empty response shape for this POST, so only a success fixture is included; HTTP status code is not explicitly stated in the doc (200 assumed). Salesforce-style IDs and the PROMO-1001/OFFER-101 codes are taken verbatim from the documented JSON examples.
